overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a dark coat walking along a coastal path at night, approaching and passing a waterfall, then continuing along a sandy beach. The scene features a moody blue nighttime atmosphere with stars visible in the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal dirt path with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a dirt path toward the coastline, flanked by wooden fences and grass banks

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path
weathered wooden fence posts lining the right side of the path
dark water visible at the end of the path under the night sky
dark silhouetted mountains rising behind the coastline
tall grass growing on embankments alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path bordered by wooden fences and grass banks, heading toward a dark coastline under a starry night sky. The path leads toward distant mountains and the open ocean visible ahead.

events.description: exits dirt path onto rocky shoreline as waterfall comes into view

agents.ego_description: walking across rocky terrain toward a large waterfall cascading down a cliff face

entered.detail: large waterfall cascading down a rocky cliff face into a pool
steep rock face with the waterfall flowing down its surface
calm water pool at the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the fenced path onto a rocky shoreline where a large waterfall becomes visible ahead. The terrain shifts from dirt to gravel and rock as the character approaches the waterfall pool.

events.description: character steps into shallow water at the edge of the waterfall pool

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge and through shallow pools at the base of the waterfall

entered.detail: large fallen logs lying on the rocky shore near the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the rocky shoreline at the base of the waterfall, stepping through shallow water pools. The waterfall recedes to the right as the character moves forward along the water's edge, passing driftwood logs.

events.description: terrain transitions from rocky shore to sandy beach with scattered driftwood
distant illuminated structures become visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the dark sandy beach toward distant lights on the horizon

entered.detail: faintly illuminated structures or ruins visible in the far distance
dark cliff face rising on the right side of the beach

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a wide sandy beach scattered with driftwood logs, leaving the waterfall behind. As the character progresses, distant illuminated structures become visible on the horizon, suggesting a destination ahead along the dark coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow rural path toward a wide, moonlit coastline. It begins with a character walking along a dirt path bordered by wooden fences and grass banks under a starry night sky, heading toward distant mountains and the open ocean. As the path ends, the terrain shifts from dirt to gravel and rock, leading the character onto a rocky shoreline toward a large, cascading waterfall. The scene then follows the character through shallow water pools at the base of the falls, passing driftwood logs as the waterfall recedes to the right. Finally, the rocky ground opens into a wide sandy beach, where the character moves forward toward illuminated structures appearing on the distant horizon.
